item.description: FigureYa101PCA Xiaofan Lu, Taojun Ye 2025-5-20 Academic Citation If you use this code in your work or research, we kindly request that you cite our publication:

item.title: About
item.description: Written in Go, Hugo is an open source static site generator available under the Apache License 2.
